attributes.action:
Increase in government funding to update mental health 
help for young people.
attributes.additional_details: When young people are given mental health support websites, there never seems to be any information about the actual issues we’re facing. There is no information designed to make us feel  calmer or safer that is actually useful within a school, or work situation for example, that doesn’t involve things like talking to someone else. What about Whalen i need to self regulate? All things like this are incredibly neglected, so please government, invest your money in making the MH work for us.
attributes.background: Please fund to update the mental health sites we have. We need factual, accurate info that helps us, not just in one situation, but many that are current. As a government, please look at putting more money into promotion of mental health charities and give them support to keep websites up to date.

rejection.details:
The following petition calls for a similar action: 

Fund improved CAMHS and crisis support, and cut waiting times 
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/759345
